aboutDesc: {programName} is a free, offline‑first study tracker based on the {programName} curriculum. It helps you work through the video lessons day‑by‑day, check off tasks, record quiz scores, and never lose your place – even without internet.
aboutFeaturesList:
• Dynamic schedule from Aleph with Beth / Alpha with Angela
• Offline‑first – works entirely without internet after first visit
• Fillable blanks for quiz scores
• Progress tracking with percentage and visual bars
• Export / import progress to back up or move devices
• Installable as a standalone app
aboutCreditsText: Curriculum courtesy of {programName} (public domain). Built with love by Humphrey Kutosi, a member of Petra Reformed Baptist Church.
aboutGlory: For the glory of God alone.
feedbackSubtitle: Report a bug, suggest a feature, or just say hi.
errorCheckConnection: Check your connection and try again.

helpInstructions.label: View your schedule
helpInstructions.desc: Tap a week (e.g., “Week 1”) to expand it, then tap a day to see its tasks.

helpInstructions.label: Check off a task
helpInstructions.desc: Tap the checkbox. The task fades and the progress ring fills up.

helpInstructions.label: Enter a quiz score
helpInstructions.desc: Tap the blank (e.g., “I got _____%”) and type your score.

helpInstructions.label: Switch profiles
helpInstructions.desc: Tap the user pill (👤) at the top, then choose a name. You can also add or edit users from there.

helpInstructions.label: Change language/time
helpInstructions.desc: Tap the gear (⚙) next to the user pill, pick your options, and tap Save.

helpInstructions.label: Backup your progress
helpInstructions.desc: Scroll to the bottom and tap Export to save a file. Tap Import to restore it later.

helpInstructions.label: Install on Android
helpInstructions.desc: A small install button (↓) will appear at the bottom right corner of the screen. Tap it to add the app to your home screen.

helpInstructions.label: Offline use
helpInstructions.desc: The app works offline after the first visit. No sign‑up needed.
